subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Joy encompasseth thee, and gladness standeth before thy face, and light pursueth from behind thee, inasmuch as thou hast turned unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ان السرور یطوفک و الفرح امام وجهک و النور یسعی عن ورائک بما توجه الیک
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @thankfulness; gratitude
